title: Beyond Prompt-Based Planning: MCP-Native Graph Planning-based Biomedical Agent System
summary: Beyond Prompt-Based Planning: MCP-Native Graph Planning-based Biomedical Agent System
whyItMatters: Biomedical agents promise to automate complex biological workflows, yet current systems face two fundamental bottlenecks: bioinformatics tools are highly heterogeneous in interfaces and execution environments, while agent planning still relies on flat prompt-retrieved tool descriptions. As biomedical software ecosystems grow, this coupling between tool cove…
